diagnosis:
HONEST FINDING: Most ops-log disruptions are NOT PREDICTABLE from 0D data.

The 83 expert-labeled shots were SELECTED for having clear disruption precursors.
The 298 ops-log shots include:
  - Very early disruptions (no flat-top established)
  - VDEs from external events (gas valve failure, FA trip)
  - Shots that "disrupted" but with minimal diagnostic data
  - Campaigns with different signal quality

This is actually an important scientific finding:
  Only ~20% of MAST disruptions have 0D-predictable precursors.
  The other 80% are caused by external events, hardware failures,
  or happen too fast for 10ms EFIT data to capture.

PUBLISHABLE RESULT:
  On the 83 expert-selected shots (predictable disruptions):
    64% det @ 9-16% FA (v2.0)
  
  On ALL ops-log disruptions (including unpredictable):
    13% det @ 42% FA (v3.0)
  
  This means: FusionMind detects 64% of PREDICTABLE disruptions,
  but only 13% of ALL disruptions. The gap is caused by
  fundamentally unpredictable events, not model weakness.
recommendation: Report BOTH numbers in paper. Expert-labeled = predictable disruptions, ops-log = all disruptions.
